title: HeyFarhanYT X Optimized
description: This my optimized modpack you should rate the modpack & i will try better in future thanks for reading
body:
This modpack is focused entirely on performance optimization and smooth gameplay. It’s designed for players who want the best FPS boost without losing the vanilla feel of Minecraft.

⚡ Key Features

🚀 Massive FPS boost with Sodium, Lithium & Starlight

🧹 Lag reduction and memory optimization

🪄 Faster world loading and smoother chunk rendering

🔧 Lightweight mod setup – easy to run on low-end PCs

🎮 Better gameplay feel with stable frame times

💻 Perfect For

Players with low-end PCs or laptops

Those who want vanilla Minecraft, but smoother

Streamers or content creators who need stable FPS
